items.name_en: ❤️Classic Check Double Strap Bag, vintage yet playful, very popular💞. It stays ahead of trends for 10 years. Vintage and classic, full of Burberry's British style💖. Exquisitely crafted in an Italian workshop. Features Burberry Check, contrast stitching leather trim, cotton blend lining. Drawstring opening, leather top handle, front zip pocket. Imported calfskin💖. Dimensions 24✕13✕37cm

items.name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry classic vintage underarm bag, glossy leather adjustable shoulder strap. Shoulder strap can be fixed to the bag with a buckle, adjustable for underarm or hand carry. High-end custom piece is super exquisite, soft and comfortable texture, premium feel. Imported glossy leather trim creates strong layers yet remains harmonious and not abrupt. Lightweight, compact yet convenient for commuting, capacity is okay.
Dimensions: 24×13×8cm
